items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟 New Arrival🆕 Mini Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Clutch features a drawstring closure with a signature twisted knot. The Flamenco Purse is cleverly redesigned with a soft, sensual drape created by delicate knots and a ruffled top. This version is crafted from soft Nappa leather. The bag is part of the Jade Jade collection, featuring a matching lucky jade stone in the interior. *Crossbody or shoulder carry* Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap *Subtle magnetic closure *Suede lining L⊚℮w℮ Gold Foil.

items.name_en: Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
items.name_cn:
Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
👜The bow🎀 is not just decoration, but the only opening for the flap. The bag features only one brass bullet buckle with a delicate brand logo, no other hardware. It embodies high-end Western European traditional leather craftsmanship and design style. So it is lightweight, and the strap is adjustable in length, suitable for any height. This is very nice💃💃
👉Small Size:20*19*11.5cm. The body is very flexible calfskin with two compartments and a card slot. Fits a short wallet, phone, lipstick💄, compact, etc. The capacity is very impressive😇. You can even bring a Kindle😍😍10183#(Plain: Caramel/White)😘 Comes with box

items.name_en: Another new arrival messenger bag💕Size 33💕11376(Creamy Green💕Glossy💕Light Brown) The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first handbag for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. Now launching a spacious, soft Hobo bag made of soft Nappa leather and suede bottom cover.
